JD-E4,Next.js Frontend Dashboard,Epic,"Scaffold the Next.js 16 frontend with standalone server config, full app router page structure, all MVP 1 components, and TanStack Query data fetching connected to the FastAPI backend.
SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
STORIES: 4.1 - 4.10","frontend,nextjs,react",
JD-24,Next.js 16 scaffold,Task,"Scaffold frontend/ with Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, MUI 7, TanStack Query v5, Zustand, and Zod.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- npx create-next-app@latest frontend --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir
- Install: @mui/material @emotion/react @emotion/styled @tanstack/react-query zustand zod
- Set output: 'standalone' and reactStrictMode: true in next.config.ts — do NOT use output: 'export'
- Create .env.local.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/api/v1
- Configure TanStack Query QueryClientProvider in app/layout.tsx with default staleTime: 30000
- Configure MUI ThemeProvider with dark/light mode toggle in app/layout.tsx
- Create lib/store.ts with Zustand stub for filter state: { sources: string[]
- Create types/job.ts mirroring backend Job model with all fields including embedding_status and saved
- Verify npm run build produces .next/standalone/server.js
EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-1
TESTING CRITERIA:
- npm run dev starts on port 3000 without errors
- npm run build produces .next/standalone directory (not /out)
- No TypeScript errors on clean build
- MUI and Tailwind styles both apply without conflict
EDGE CASES:
- output: 'standalone' is required — output: 'export' disables dynamic routes and is incompatible with this architecture
- MUI ThemeProvider must wrap the entire layout
JD-24b,App router page structure,Task,"Create all MVP 1 app/ pages and route layout following the proposal file tree.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- app/layout.tsx: root layout with QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, nav links to / | /saved | /applications | /recruiters
- app/page.tsx: dashboard — renders FilterBar + list of JobCard components
column3: renders OnboardingBanner if profile not complete

column1: - app/onboarding/page.tsx: renders ProfileForm then CVUploadPanel in sequence
column4: after CV upload polls GET /api/v1/cv/status every 5s via useEffect + useState until embedding_status = ready

column1: - app/profile/page.tsx: fetches GET /api/v1/profile
column4: renders ProfileForm pre-populated + CVUploadPanel with current filename

column1: - app/saved/page.tsx: renders SavedJobsList component
- app/jobs/[id]/page.tsx: fetches GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}
column2: renders job detail, Save/Unsave toggle, Generate Cover Letter button (disabled in MVP 1 with tooltip), Generate Interview Prep button (disabled in MVP 1), Log Application button

column1: - app/applications/page.tsx: fetches GET /api/v1/applications
- app/applications/[id]/page.tsx: application detail with status transitions and notes
- app/recruiters/page.tsx: fetches GET /api/v1/recruiters
- app/admin/page.tsx: admin panel hidden behind feature_admin_panel flag
EFFORT: L (8 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- All routes render without runtime errors
- OnboardingBanner shows on / when profile incomplete
- /onboarding flow transitions ProfileForm → CVUploadPanel → / on completion
- /profile correctly selects POST vs PATCH based on 404/200 response
EDGE CASES:
- /jobs/[id] Generate Cover Letter button must check embedding_status = ready
column2: render greyed in MVP 1 with tooltip: 'Cover letter generation is available from MVP2. CV embedding is not yet active.'

column1: - /admin visible only in developer mode (feature_admin_panel flag = true)","frontend,nextjs,pages",JD-E4
JD-25,JobCard component,Task,"Create frontend/components/JobCard.tsx displaying job details with Save toggle and job detail navigation.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Props: job: Job (from types/job.ts)
- Display: title (h3 linking to /jobs/{id} on click), company, location, source badge (chip coloured per source: linkedin=blue, jobserve=green), salary_min/max if present, scraped_at as relative time
- Save toggle button: local state initialised from job.saved
column2: on toggle calls POST /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save (to save) or DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save (to unsave)
column3: use useOptimistic for instant UI feedback before server confirms

column1: - On card title click: router.push('/jobs/' + job.id) — navigates to job detail page
- Use MUI Card as container with hover elevation
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- Renders all required fields
- Source badge colour differs per source
- Save toggle updates immediately (optimistic) then confirms from server
- Title click navigates to /jobs/{id}
- relevance_score omitted gracefully when null
EDGE CASES:
- Long titles truncated at 2 lines with ellipsis (CSS line-clamp)
- Missing company renders 'Unknown company'
- DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save on error: revert optimistic state and show toast","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-26,FilterBar component,Task,"Create frontend/components/FilterBar.tsx with source and keyword client-side filters backed by Zustand.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Props: onFilter: (filters: FilterState) => void
- FilterState type: { sources: string[]
- Source filter: checkboxes for linkedin and jobserve (hardcoded MVP 1
- Keyword filter: controlled text input with 300ms debounce using useEffect
- Read/write filter state from Zustand store (lib/store.ts) — persists across re-renders
- Filtering is client-side — no additional API call on filter change
column2: parent page re-filters its TanStack Query cached data

column1: - Clear all button resets both filters to defaults (all sources checked, keyword empty)
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24, JD-25
TESTING CRITERIA:
- Keyword filter narrows JobCard list in real time with debounce
- Source checkboxes show/hide jobs by source
- Clear all resets to full unfiltered state
- Filter state persists on re-render (Zustand)
EDGE CASES:
- Deselecting all sources shows empty state: 'No sources selected'
- Empty keyword input shows all jobs unfiltered","frontend,components,filtering",JD-E4
JD-27,ScrapeButton component,Task,"Create frontend/components/ScrapeButton.tsx triggering POST /api/v1/scrape with in-progress and result states.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- useMutation from TanStack Query for POST /api/v1/scrape
- Button labels: 'Scrape Jobs' (idle) | 'Scraping...' (pending) | 'Done' (success, resets after 2s)
- Disable button while mutation is pending
- On success: invalidate ['jobs'] query
column2: show MUI Snackbar with per-source counts from ScrapeResult.results

column1: - On 409 (lock held): show Snackbar 'Scrape already in progress'
- On other error: show Snackbar with status code and detail message
- MUI Button with CircularProgress spinner overlay when pending
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24, JD-23
TESTING CRITERIA:
- Triggers POST /api/v1/scrape on click
- Pending state disables button and shows spinner
- 409 response shows correct snackbar message
- Success invalidates jobs query causing dashboard to refresh
EDGE CASES:
- Double-click prevented: button disabled during pending
- Network timeout shows error snackbar (not silent failure)","frontend,components,api",JD-E4
JD-24c,OnboardingBanner component,Task,"Create frontend/components/OnboardingBanner.tsx that guides users through profile + CV setup using shared query keys.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Fetch GET /api/v1/profile with TanStack Query key ['profile']
- Fetch GET /api/v1/cv/status with TanStack Query key ['cv-status']
- Render states:
1. profile 404 or null: show banner 'Complete your profile to get started' with link to /onboarding
2. profile exists but cv_status != ready: show banner 'Upload your CV to enable AI features' with link to /onboarding
3. both ready: render nothing (null)
- Query key contract: any component that mutates profile or CV data MUST invalidate ['profile'] or ['cv-status'] on success — this is how the banner updates without page reload
- Use MUI Alert component for banner styling
EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- Banner shows when profile is incomplete
- Banner updates to CV step after profile saved (without page reload)
- Banner disappears entirely when CV is ready
- invalidateQueries(['profile']) from /onboarding/page.tsx causes banner to re-render
EDGE CASES:
- Banner must not flash on initial load when data is already ready — use isLoading state to suppress until resolved","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24d,ProfileForm and CVUploadPanel components,Task,"Create frontend/components/ProfileForm.tsx and frontend/components/CVUploadPanel.tsx for user onboarding and profile editing.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
ProfileForm.tsx:
- Props: onSubmit: (data: ProfileFormData) => Promise<void>
- Fields: full_name, email, target_role, target_location, skills (comma-separated input), years_experience
- Validate with Zod schema before calling onSubmit prop
- Component never calls an API directly — parent page passes the correct handler (POST from /onboarding, POST or PATCH from /profile based on 404/200 check)
- Use MUI TextField, Select, Button components
CVUploadPanel.tsx:
- Props: currentFilename?: string
- File input accepting .pdf and .docx only
- Show current CV filename if provided
- On file select: call onUpload prop
column2: show upload progress via MUI LinearProgress

column1: - After upload completes: show 'CV uploaded — processing...' and poll GET /api/v1/cv/status every 5s via TanStack Query refetchInterval until embedding_status = ready
- In MVP 1: when status returns stub message (not real embedding), show 'CV received. Embedding available from MVP 2.'
EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- ProfileForm Zod validation prevents submit with missing required fields
- ProfileForm never calls API — parent handler called on submit
- CVUploadPanel rejects non-PDF/DOCX files
- CVUploadPanel polls status and transitions to ready state
- In MVP 1: stub status message shown without error
EDGE CASES:
- ProfileForm onSubmit prop errors must be caught and shown as form-level error toast
- CVUploadPanel must handle network error during upload gracefully","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24e,SavedJobsList and ApplicationBoard components,Task,"Create frontend/components/SavedJobsList.tsx and frontend/components/ApplicationBoard.tsx.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
SavedJobsList.tsx:
- Fetches GET /api/v1/jobs/saved with TanStack Query key ['saved-jobs']
- Loading state: skeleton list of 3 placeholder JobCard shapes (MUI Skeleton)
- Empty state: 'No saved jobs yet. Browse the job feed and save roles you\'re interested in.' with 'Browse jobs' button linking to /
- Populated state: one JobCard per saved job (same component as main feed)
ApplicationBoard.tsx:
- Props: applications: Application[]
- Kanban-style columns, one per Application.status value: draft | applied | awaiting_response | interviewing | offered | rejected | withdrawn
- Each card: job title, company, applied_at
- Status transitions triggered by PATCH /api/v1/applications/{id} via drag-drop or status select dropdown
- Use ApplicationStatusBadge.tsx for colour-coded status display
ApplicationStatusBadge.tsx:
- Props: status: Application['status']
- Colour map: draft=grey, applied=blue, awaiting_response=yellow, interviewing=purple, offered=green, rejected=red, withdrawn=grey
- Renders MUI Chip with appropriate colour
EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24, JD-25
TESTING CRITERIA:
- SavedJobsList shows skeleton during load, empty state when 0 results, jobs when populated
- ApplicationBoard renders correct number of columns
- ApplicationStatusBadge renders correct colour per status
- Clicking application card navigates to /applications/{id}
EDGE CASES:
- Empty columns still render (no jobs in that status) — show column header with 0 count
- Drag-drop is progressive enhancement — status dropdown is the baseline fallback","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24f,RecruiterCard and AdminPanel components,Task,"Create frontend/components/RecruiterCard.tsx and frontend/components/AdminPanel.tsx.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
RecruiterCard.tsx:
- Props: recruiter: Recruiter
- Display: name, company, email (if present), interaction_score as star rating or numeric, notes (truncated)
- 'Log interaction' button: calls POST /api/v1/recruiters/{id}/interaction
- Notes field: MUI TextField
AdminPanel.tsx:
- Fetches GET /api/v1/admin/dlq on mount
column2: renders DLQ table with columns: id, agent, error, created_at, retry count

column1: - Retry button: POST /api/v1/admin/dlq/{id}/retry
- Discard button: POST /api/v1/admin/dlq/{id}/discard
- Fetches GET /api/v1/admin/schedule
column2: renders Pause/Resume buttons for each agent schedule

column1: - Hidden behind feature_admin_panel flag: fetches GET /api/v1/feature-flags
column2: only renders when flag is true

column1: - Link to admin panel in navigation marked 'Dev only'
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- RecruiterCard renders all fields
column2: score increments optimistically on interaction log

column1: - AdminPanel DLQ table shows entries
- AdminPanel not visible when feature_admin_panel flag is false
EDGE CASES:
- AdminPanel must handle empty DLQ gracefully: show 'No failed jobs in queue'
- RecruiterCard notes PATCH called on blur not on every keystroke","frontend,components",JD-E4
JD-24g,CoverLetterViewer component,Task,"Create frontend/components/CoverLetterViewer.tsx for polling, rendering, and downloading generated cover letters.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Props: job_id: string
- On mount: GET /api/v1/cover-letter/{job_id} with TanStack Query key ['cover-letter', job_id]
- If status = pending or generating: poll every 3s via refetchInterval until status = ready
- When ready: render cover letter content as formatted text (whitespace-pre-wrap)
- Two download buttons: 'Download PDF' and 'Download Markdown'
- Each button onClick: fetch('/api/v1/cover-letter/{job_id}/export?format=pdf|markdown')
- On 422 from export: show toast 'Cover letter is no longer available. Please regenerate it.' — do NOT offer retry
- On other non-2xx from export: show toast 'Download failed. Please try again.'
- In MVP 1: component is scaffolded but disabled — cover letter generation is MVP 2 only
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Frontend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-24
TESTING CRITERIA:
- Polls every 3s until status = ready
- Ready state renders formatted cover letter text
- PDF download creates correct Blob and triggers browser download
- 422 shows correct toast and does not offer retry
- MVP 1: component renders but is not reachable (button on /jobs/[id] is disabled)
EDGE CASES:
- Revoke object URL after download to prevent memory leak
- Do not render download buttons while status is still pending","frontend,components,ai",JD-E4

JD-E5,Versioned API & CI Skeleton,Epic,"Implement the jobs router with cursor-based pagination, profile and CV endpoints, feature flags, admin process scripts, and GitHub Actions CI skeleton using reusable workflow patterns.
SCOPE: MVP 1
PROJECT AREA: Backend / Infrastructure
STORIES: 5.1 - 5.5","backend,api,cicd,infrastructure",
JD-28,Jobs router,Task,"Create backend/routers/jobs.py with paginated job listing, job detail, save/unsave, and saved jobs list endpoints.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- GET /api/v1/jobs: query params page_size (int, default 20, max 100), cursor (str | None)
- Cursor-based pagination over fake_db list: encode cursor as base64 offset for MVP 1
- Apply filter_jobs() when keyword query param provided
- GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}: return single Job or RFC 7807 404 HTTPException {type, title, status, detail}
- POST /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save: mark job as saved
- DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}/save: mark job as unsaved
- GET /api/v1/jobs/saved: return list of saved Jobs
- All endpoints use response_model= for OpenAPI generation
- Log request params and outcome via get_logger
EFFORT: M (4 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-18, JD-17
TESTING CRITERIA:
- GET /api/v1/jobs returns paginated JobListResponse
- has_next=true when more results exist
- GET /api/v1/jobs/unknown-id returns RFC 7807 404
- POST then DELETE save toggle works
- page_size > 100 clamped to 100
EDGE CASES:
- Empty fake_db returns empty jobs list (not 500)
- GET /api/v1/jobs/saved route must be defined before /api/v1/jobs/{id} to avoid route shadowing in FastAPI","backend,api,pagination",JD-E5
JD-28b,Profile and CV endpoints,Task,"Create backend/routers/profile.py and backend/routers/cv.py for user profile management and CV upload.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
profile.py:
- GET /api/v1/profile: return UserProfile for SINGLE_USER_ID or RFC 7807 404 if not yet created
- POST /api/v1/profile: create UserProfile
- PATCH /api/v1/profile: partial update UserProfile fields
- Store in fake_db under 'profiles' key (dict[str, UserProfile])
cv.py:
- POST /api/v1/cv: accept multipart/form-data file upload
- GET /api/v1/cv/status: return {embedding_status: 'pending', message: 'CV received. Embedding available from MVP 2.'} in MVP 1 — stub response with correct shape for frontend polling
feature_flags.py:
- GET /api/v1/feature-flags: return {feature_interview_prep: false, feature_admin_panel: false} in MVP 1 — all flags false until MVP 3
EFFORT: M (3 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-16, JD-18
TESTING CRITERIA:
- GET /api/v1/profile returns 404 before profile created
- PATCH /api/v1/profile updates only provided fields
- POST /api/v1/cv rejects non-PDF/DOCX with 422
- GET /api/v1/cv/status returns correct stub shape in MVP 1
- GET /api/v1/feature-flags returns all flags false in MVP 1
EDGE CASES:
- POST /api/v1/profile when profile already exists returns 409 with existing_id
- CV file size limit: reject files > 10MB with 413","backend,api,profile",JD-E5
JD-29,OpenAPI spec completeness,Task,"Ensure all routes are fully typed with Pydantic request/response models and RFC 7807 error shapes.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- All endpoints use response_model= parameter on decorator
- All request bodies use Pydantic BaseModel subclasses
- Add summary= and description= to each endpoint decorator
- Add tags= to each APIRouter (jobs, scrape, profile, cv, feature-flags, admin)
- Add Field(examples=[...]) to Pydantic models for realistic docs UI values
- Standardise all error responses to RFC 7807 shape: {type: str, title: str, status: int, detail: str}
- Verify /docs and /redoc render without errors and all schemas are listed
EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-28, JD-28b, JD-23
TESTING CRITERIA:
- /docs accessible
column2: all endpoints listed with correct request/response schemas

column1: - RFC 7807 error shape used consistently across all error responses
- Field examples render in docs UI for all key models
EDGE CASES:
- UUID fields need explicit json_schema_extra or Field annotation for OpenAPI type=string format=uuid
- Optional fields must show as nullable in schema (not absent)","backend,api,documentation",JD-E5
JD-30,Admin process scripts,Task,"Create backend/admin/ directory with seed_keywords.py, clear_db.py, and stubs for replay_dlq.py and run_evals.py.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- All scripts import settings from settings.py and use get_logger from logging_config.py
- All scripts runnable as: uv run python admin/{script}.py (Twelve-Factor XII — isolated processes)
- seed_keywords.py: print each keyword from DEFAULT_KEYWORDS in filters.py
column3: stub comment for future Supabase insert

column1: - clear_db.py: call clear_jobs() from fake_db.py
column3: include # DEV ONLY comment at top
column4: exit 1 if DATABASE_URL is set (prevent accidental production run)

column1: - replay_dlq.py: stub — raise NotImplementedError('Implemented in MVP 2 (JD-E10)')
- run_evals.py: stub — raise NotImplementedError('Implemented in MVP 1.1 (JD-E7)')
EFFORT: S (2 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Backend
DEPENDENCIES: JD-17, JD-18
TESTING CRITERIA:
- seed_keywords.py runs without errors and prints keyword list to stdout
- clear_db.py empties fake_db and logs cleared count
- Stub scripts exit 0 with informative log message
EDGE CASES:
- Scripts must not import uvicorn or trigger any server-start side effects
- Scripts must be tracked in version control (not gitignored)","backend,admin,scripts",JD-E5
JD-31,GitHub Actions CI skeleton,Task,"Create .github/workflows/ci.yml using reusable workflow patterns with linting, type checking, tests, and Docker build.
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Trigger: on: pull_request (all branches) and push to main
- Use reusable workflows per GitHub Actions 2026 best practices: reference https://docs.github.com/en/actions/how-tos/reuse-automations/reuse-workflows
- Jobs: lint-and-type-check, test-backend, test-frontend, docker-build, check-workflow-docs
- lint-and-type-check:
- Backend: actions/setup-python, install uv, uv sync --dev, uv run ruff check backend/, uv run mypy backend/ --strict
- Frontend: actions/setup-node@v4 with node-version: 22, npm ci, npx eslint frontend/, npx tsc --noEmit
- test-backend: uv run pytest backend/tests/ -v --tb=short --asyncio-mode=auto
- test-frontend: npm run test (Vitest)
- docker-build: docker/setup-buildx-action
- check-workflow-docs: test -f docs/tasks/todo.md && [ $(wc -l < docs/tasks/todo.md) -gt 1 ]
- Cache: actions/cache for uv (.venv) and npm (node_modules)
- Timeout: 15 minutes per job
EFFORT: M (5 hours)
PROJECT AREA: Infrastructure / CI
DEPENDENCIES: JD-2, JD-12
TESTING CRITERIA:
- All jobs trigger on PR and push to main
- Lint or type failure fails the build
- Docker build uses GHA layer cache (fast on subsequent runs)
- check-workflow-docs fails when either file is missing or empty
EDGE CASES:
- Playwright install NOT required in CI — scraper agents are mocked in tests
- pytest-asyncio required with asyncio_mode=auto for FastAPI async route tests
- Docker buildx required for --cache-from/--cache-to GHA cache support","cicd,github,infrastructure",JD-E5
